preToolUse.description: Block edits to security policy files without reviewer note
preToolUse.command: if echo $TOOL_FILE | grep -qE 'SECURITY\.md|security-policy'; then echo REMINDER: security policy change requires AppSec reviewer sign-off; fi; true

postToolUse.command: case $TOOL_FILE in *package.json|*package-lock.json) npm audit --audit-level=high 2>/dev/null || true ;; *requirements*.txt|*pyproject.toml) (command -v pip-audit >/dev/null && pip-audit 2>/dev/null) || true ;; esac; true
if echo $TOOL_FILE | grep -qE '\.(ts|js|py|go|java|rb)$'; then (command -v semgrep >/dev/null && semgrep --config=auto --error $TOOL_FILE 2>/dev/null) || true; fi; true
